summary: Ran the 6 targeted checks for 999 Taxi landing (UZ/RU, no backend). ALL 6 PASS. Lead form submit correctly opens https://t.me/t_boxodir?text=... via window.open with prefilled Uzbek/Russian message including name+phone; success 'Rahmat!' renders and reset clears fields on both desktop 1440x800 and mobile 390x844. All Telegram CTAs (nav, final, sticky) target t.me/t_boxodir; call CTAs use tel:+998781139991. Mobile sticky bottom bar does NOT cover leadform-submit (elementFromPoint at submit center returned the button itself). Full-page scroll top→bottom at both viewports: footer renders, zero console errors, FAQ item 0 aria-expanded toggles true→false. Mobile scrollWidth == innerWidth (390) at 3 scroll depths — no horizontal overflow. RU toggle: after localStorage lang999='ru' and full navigation reload, hero renders '999 Taxi — начните работать в Яндекс Go быстрее.' (Cyrillic).
observations_non_blocking: On initial mobile page load, a spurious window.open(undefined) call was captured in the override array (produces a single null entry before any user click). The subsequent legitimate submit call correctly pushes the t.me/t_boxodir?text=... URL, so lead flow is unaffected. Likely source: an anchor/effect firing on mount or a Lenis-related noop. Non-blocking but worth a quick audit of any programmatic window.open / <a target=_blank> in header/sticky mount effects.

Playwright's built-in page.fill/click hangs after submit because window.open(...,'_blank') triggers a 'wait for scheduled navigations'. Tests worked reliably using JS click + native input setter — no product change needed.

verified_data.ru_hero_after_reload: 999 Taxi — начните работать в Яндекс Go быстрее.

critical_code_review_comments: LeadForm.jsx submit uses window.open(url,'_blank') — good, but consider adding a small guard/return check when the popup is blocked (window.open returns null in strict popup-blocked contexts). Currently setSent(true) fires regardless, which is UX-acceptable given the intent-to-message pattern.
Investigate spurious window.open(undefined) call happening on mobile page load (see observations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 acceptance checks passed. If retesting, prefer JS-based interactions: (a) override window.open before form submit to capture popup URL, (b) set input values via the React setter (Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set + dispatch 'input' event) and click via element.click() — Playwright's native fill/click stalls waiting on Lenis scroll + popup navigation. For RU reload persistence, use localStorage.setItem('lang999','ru') + page.goto() (page.reload hung once in headless).
